description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a dark gable roof and a spacious front porch, set within a neatly landscaped yard. The structure features a combination of wood and brick exterior walls, with large windows distributed along the front and sides, allowing ample natural light inside. The front entrance is accessible via a wide paved driveway that leads up to the porch, flanked by greenery and mature trees. A circular paved area with a central feature, possibly a fountain or planter, is visible in the side yard, adding to the home's curb appeal. The backyard is enclosed with hedges and includes additional paved walkways and open grassy areas. The overall design is compact yet inviting, with a focus on outdoor living and harmonious integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A single-story bungalow with a dark gable roof, wide front porch, and landscaped yard featuring paved driveways, mature trees, and a circular side feature.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide porch, main entrance, and paved driveway leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the circular paved area with a central feature and the side entrance.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, hedges, and additional paved walkways.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with more trees and a clear look at the side path and driveway.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
